message:
Command `# Check synthesis log file size and modification time
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"

stat "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Check pipe state for the librelane → yosys pipe (pipe 745653)
ls -la /proc/214817/fd 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo ""
# Check if librelane threads are running  
ls /proc/214817/task/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
echo "LibreLane threads active"` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Check synthesis log file size and modification time
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"

stat "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Check pipe state for the librelane → yosys pipe (pipe 745653)
ls -la /proc/214817/fd 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo ""
# Check if librelane threads are running  
ls /proc/214817/task/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
echo "LibreLane threads active"
